mapper.select:
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM excellent_product_cert WHERE vendor_biz_reg_no IN ('1188117437', '1188119624') AND is_active = 'Y') AS ownProductCount,
(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT vendor_biz_reg_no) FROM excellent_product_cert WHERE vendor_biz_reg_no NOT IN ('1188117437', '1188119624') AND is_active = 'Y' AND product_code IN ( SELECT product_code FROM excellent_product_cert WHERE vendor_biz_reg_no IN ('1188117437', '1188119624') AND is_active = 'Y')) AS competitorCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM excellent_product_cert WHERE vendor_biz_reg_no IN ('1188117437', '1188119624') AND is_active = 'Y' AND expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND expiry_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)) AS expiringSoonCount

SELECT product_code AS productCode, product_name AS productName, item_category_name AS itemCategoryName, vendor_name AS vendorName, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, vendor_region AS vendorRegion, acquisition_date AS acquisitionDate, expiry_date AS expiryDate, CASE WHEN expiry_date IS NULL THEN 'unknown' WHEN expiry_date < CURDATE() THEN 'expired' WHEN expiry_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN 'expiring' ELSE 'valid' END AS status FROM excellent_product_cert WHERE vendor_biz_reg_no IN ('1188117437', '1188119624') AND is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY expiry_date ASC, product_code

SELECT e.product_code AS productCode, e.product_name AS productName, e.item_category_name AS itemCategoryName, e.vendor_name AS vendorName, e.vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, e.vendor_region AS vendorRegion, e.acquisition_date AS acquisitionDate, e.expiry_date AS expiryDate, CASE WHEN e.expiry_date IS NULL THEN 'unknown' WHEN e.expiry_date < CURDATE() THEN 'expired' WHEN e.expiry_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN 'expiring' ELSE 'valid' END AS status FROM excellent_product_cert e WHERE e.is_active = 'Y' AND e.vendor_biz_reg_no NOT IN ('1188117437', '1188119624') AND e.product_code IN ( SELECT product_code FROM excellent_product_cert WHERE vendor_biz_reg_no IN ('1188117437', '1188119624') AND is_active = 'Y') ORDER BY e.product_code, e.vendor_region, e.vendor_name

SELECT COALESCE(vendor_region, '지역 미상') AS region, COUNT(DISTINCT vendor_biz_reg_no) AS vendorCount, COUNT(DISTINCT product_code) AS productCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT vendor_name ORDER BY vendor_name SEPARATOR ', ') AS vendorNames FROM excellent_product_cert WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND vendor_biz_reg_no NOT IN ('1188117437', '1188119624') AND product_code IN ( SELECT product_code FROM excellent_product_cert WHERE vendor_biz_reg_no IN ('1188117437', '1188119624') AND is_active = 'Y') GROUP BY vendor_region ORDER BY vendorCount DESC, region

SELECT product_code AS productCode, product_name AS productName, item_category_name AS itemCategoryName, vendor_name AS vendorName, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, vendor_region AS vendorRegion, acquisition_date AS acquisitionDate, expiry_date AS expiryDate, CASE WHEN vendor_biz_reg_no IN ('1188117437', '1188119624') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS isOwnCompany, CASE WHEN expiry_date IS NULL THEN 'unknown' WHEN expiry_date < CURDATE() THEN 'expired' WHEN expiry_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN 'expiring' ELSE 'valid' END AS status FROM excellent_product_cert WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND product_code IN ( SELECT product_code FROM excellent_product_cert WHERE vendor_biz_reg_no IN ('1188117437', '1188119624') AND is_active = 'Y') ORDER BY product_code, CASE WHEN vendor_biz_reg_no IN ('1188117437', '1188119624') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, vendor_region, vendor_name
